name: HGC Centralized Supermeter
desc: Centralized data collection supermeter, M-Bus/RS485 slave devices, 4G/5G/LAN/WiFi uplink, 250-node capacity, compatible with heat/water/electricity/gas meters. IP54.
overview: The HGC Centralized Supermeter is an M-Bus master data concentrator for district and campus meter reading. It connects to water, heat, electricity and gas meters via M-Bus / RS485, schedules automatic meter reading, stores data locally, and uploads to the Heimayi cloud platform via 4G, 5G, Ethernet or WiFi. Web-based management interface with two-way command support.

specs.label: Downlink communication
specs.value: RS485 / M-Bus / LoRa; RS232 (fault code output)

features: Supports remote online upgrade and remote operation & maintenance management
Wide compatibility: simultaneously manages water, electricity, heat and flow meters on one concentrator
High-reliability automation: periodic auto meter reading, auto protocol parsing, offline operation and local data backup
Built-in web server: manage concentrator and set parameters from any PC browser
Hardware watchdog: auto-resets system after fault or power failure — no manual intervention needed
Open secondary development interfaces — easily integrates with third-party meter management platforms
